message:
feat(fp-frame): expand timezone localization with series-level ambiguous/nonexistent policies

Adds TzAmbiguousPolicy::Infer and Mask variants, TzNonexistentPolicy::ShiftBy,
and refactors tz_localize to resolve ambiguous policies per-element across a
full series rather than per-scalar. Enables pandas-compatible DST inference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
